spoilers.title: #ONEPIECE1179 Killingham: I won’t forget your name, Sanji! Now, say my name! Sanji: I… forgot… 😭🤣🤣🤣🤣 Sanji really give Kilingham ptsd😭😭🤣 The Will of Marco (マルコの意志) (@TheWillOfMarco) #ONEPIECE1
spoilers.text: #ONEPIECE1179 Killingham: I won’t forget your name, Sanji! Now, say my name! Sanji: I… forgot… 😭🤣🤣🤣🤣 Sanji really give Kilingham ptsd😭😭🤣 The Will of Marco (マルコの意志) (@TheWillOfMarco) #ONEPIECE1179 Some funny scenes among the Straw Hats in this chapter 😂😂😂 Gerd and Goldberg present the captured Sommers and his “steel heart” to Hajrudin and Zoro. Gerd pulls Sommers apart and says he’s like a magnet and its scary. Sommers retorts that she’s the scary one LMAO. Hajrudin: A steel heart?! Zoro: Could it be… if we destroy this, these bastards won’t return to normal? SFX: GASP! (Sommers has a shocked look on his face, like when someone’s secret has been exposed LOL) (Cut to Franky’s side) Franky: Get a grip, Usopp! Brook! Your bones are broken—shall I turn you into cyborgs? Usopp and Brook: GULP! Jinbei: Where’s Chopper?! (the three sections of Killingham's body was hung on a tree) Killingham: I won’t forget your name, Sanji! Now, say my name! Sanji: I… forgot… 🤣🤣🤣 — https://nitter.net/TheWillOfMarco/status/2039592428211150876#m

spoilers.title: #ONEPIECE1179 Some funny scenes among the Straw Hats in this chapter 😂😂😂 Gerd and Goldberg present the captured Sommers and his “steel heart” to Hajrudin and Zoro. Gerd pulls Sommers apart and says
spoilers.text: #ONEPIECE1179 Some funny scenes among the Straw Hats in this chapter 😂😂😂 Gerd and Goldberg present the captured Sommers and his “steel heart” to Hajrudin and Zoro. Gerd pulls Sommers apart and says he’s like a magnet and its scary. Sommers retorts that she’s the scary one LMAO. Hajrudin: A steel heart?! Zoro: Could it be… if we destroy this, these bastards won’t return to normal? SFX: GASP! (Sommers has a shocked look on his face, like when someone’s secret has been exposed LOL) (Cut to Franky’s side) Franky: Get a grip, Usopp! Brook! Your bones are broken—shall I turn you into cyborgs? Usopp and Brook: GULP! Jinbei: Where’s Chopper?! (the three sections of Killingham's body was hung on a tree) Killingham: I won’t forget your name, Sanji! Now, say my name! Sanji: I… forgot… 🤣🤣🤣

misc.text: Berserk just got a HUGE update… and no one saw this coming 😳🔥 A brand-new anime adaptation by WIT Studio was announced just 1 hour ago. This could finally be the Berserk adaptation fans have been waiting for… 🩸⚔️ Do you think they’ll nail it?

misc.title: People are saying it’s fake… but just look at this. This is the leaked provisional poster from MAPPA that’s been going around, and I’m showing it right here. Also, if you look closely at the bottom, i
misc.text: People are saying it’s fake… but just look at this. This is the leaked provisional poster from MAPPA that’s been going around, and I’m showing it right here. Also, if you look closely at the bottom, it kinda looks like it says “March 29”… 👀 I don’t know, judge for yourselves, but this feels off in a real way. 🩸⚔️ Daily Berserk 𒉭 (@daily_berserk) Berserk is finally getting a new anime adaptation by MAPPA 😳🔥 The announcement dropped just 1 hour ago, and fans are already losing their minds. After all these years… Guts is coming back in the way he deserves. 🩸⚔️ Are we ready for this? — https://nitter.net/daily_berserk/status/2039053928663253083#m
